subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I appreciate the interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Could you share a few time slots that work for you next week, along with your timezone? I'll do my best to find a match on our end.

Regarding internal contact details, I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information for leadership. If it makes sense after our initial conversation, I can help facilitate introductions to the right people on our side.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
